_comment: Multiplayer audio sandbox bus config. v0.23.17: simplified from the v0.23.16 version which tried to use sfx_local/sfx_remote categories — those aren't in gool's allowed set ({music, voice, sfx, ambience, ui, dialogue}), so the parser rejected the config and runtime init failed. The fix uses a single Sfx bus that sidechains the Music bus, so any gunshot (yours OR a remote peer's) ducks the music. Per-peer ducking (only your own actions duck music) requires a play-time bus override API gool doesn't currently expose; tracked as a roadmap item.
